zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Joan of Acre於1272年4月22日出生在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا時，她的父親Edward I King of England32歲，母親Eleanor of Castile Queen of England32歲。她於1290年4月30日與Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1307年4月23日在英國素福爾可克萊爾享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德奧斯丁 福利亞斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Joan of Acre于1272年4月22日出生在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا时，她的父亲Edward I King of England32岁，母亲Eleanor of Castile Queen of England32岁。她于1290年4月30日与Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1307年4月23日在英国素福爾可克萊爾享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德奧斯丁 福利亞斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Joan of Acre was born on 22 April 1272, in Acre, Northern, Palestine, her father, Edward I King of England, was 32 and her mother, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, was 32. She married Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester on 30 April 1290, in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 23 April 1307, in Clare, Suffolk, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Austin Friars Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Joan of Acre est née le 22 avril 1272, à Acre, Northern, Palestine, son père, Edward I King of England, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester le 30 avril 1290, à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1307, à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Austin Friars Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Joan of Acre am 22. April 1272 in Acre, Northern, Palästina geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward I King of England 32 und ihre Mutter Eleanor of Castile Queen of England 32. Sie hat am 30. April 1290 in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. April 1307 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Clare, Suffolk, England und wurde in Austin Friars Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Joan of Acre è nata il il 22 aprile 1272 nel Acre, Northern, Palestina, sua padre, Edward I King of England, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester il 30 aprile 1290, nel Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1307, nel Clare, Suffolk, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Austin Friars Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Joan of Acreが1272年4月22日にパレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاで生まれた時，父Edward I King of Englandは32歳，母Eleanor of Castile Queen of Englandは32歳であった。1290年4月30日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーでGilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1307年4月23日にイギリススフォルククラーで35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードアウスティン フリアルズ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Joan of Acre(이)가 1272년 4월 22일 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward I King of England(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor of Castile Queen of England(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1290년 4월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에서 Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 4월 23일 영국 수폴크 클래르에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 오스틴 프리아르스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Joan of Acre nasceu em 22 de abril de 1272, em Acre, Northern, Palestina, seu pai, Edward I King of England, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester em 30 de abril de 1290, em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1307, em Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Austin Friars Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Joan of Acre родилась 22 апреля 1272 г. в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина, её отцу по имени Edward I King of England было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester 30 апреля 1290 г. в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 апреля 1307 г. в местности клар, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности аустинь фрярс чурч, стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Joan of Acre nació el 22 de abril de 1272, en Acre, Northern, Palestina, su papá, Edward I King of England, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Gilbert de Clare 7th Earl of Gloucester el 30 de abril de 1290, en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1307, en Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Austin Friars Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
